rule CDB_Browser_Security_ZeroDays_Are_Only_Part_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Browser Security: Zero-Days Are Only Part of the Problem"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-07-13"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-59245: Apache Airflow FAB provider: FAB auth manage"; content:"CVE-2026-59245"; nocase; sid:7852050; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
